title.en: Who doesn't want a treasure like the Heaven Spl...

content.en:
Who doesn't want a treasure like the Heaven Splitting God Pillar?

Even if it was his master, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, when he saw the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, once he knew the usefulness of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, he would probably go crazy.

Now, there shouldn't be a few people who know all the abilities of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, and those Dao Ancestor incarnations may not know that the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar can assist in merging the Dao, otherwise, the competition will be too great.

Of course, sooner or later, the usefulness of the Sky Splitting Pillar will be revealed.

But as long as it is not exposed now, Ye Tian will have the hope of snatching the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar in his hands.

......

"What kind of treasure is this?"

The incarnation of a famous Dao Ancestor was attracted by the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, and it was impossible not to be attracted, because the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar was born, and the movement was too big.

Even if you don't know about the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, you know that this is a treasure that is not simple.

And the Dao Ancestor who had just cracked the Great Array and made the Heaven Splitting God Pillar come out was the Linglan Dao Ancestor known as the King of the Array, he was extremely proficient in the formation, and when he saw that this large array was very extraordinary, and it was difficult to peek into the internal situation, he tried to crack this formation.

But he never expected that after cracking the Great Array, such a treasure would appear.

Immediately, he wanted to snatch this treasure and hold it in his hands.

However, the Splitting Pillar is connected to the earth, and the qi machine is integrated with the Splitting Heaven Sect, and if you want to collect the Splitting Pillar of the Heaven, you must first cut off the connection between the Splitting Pillar and the earth, and then forcibly break the Splitting Pillar and the Splitting Sect's qi and merge with it.

If the Heaven Splitting Sect was still there, they, the Dao Ancestor Incarnations, would not have wanted to take the Heaven Splitting God Pillar at all, but now that the Heaven Splitting Sect had dissipated between heaven and earth, leaving only one ruin, there was hope of taking it away.

"Broken!"

Linglan Dao Ancestor struggled and slashed towards the connection between the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar and the earth.

Bang!!!

Under the single blow, the Sky Splitting Divine Pillar shook endlessly, but it did not cut through the connection with a single blow, and it would take at least several blows to completely cut off the connection.

At this time, the other Dao Ancestor incarnations all came here.

Obviously, the other Dao Ancestor incarnations also wanted to obtain the supreme treasure of the Heaven Splitting God Pillar.

"First cut off the connection between this supreme treasure and the earth, then fuse it with the Heaven Splitting Sect Qi Machine, and then snatch this supreme treasure with strength, whoever grabs it will belong to whom?" a Dao Ancestor incarnation proposed.

The other Dao Ancestor incarnations didn't have any opinions, after all, if they didn't separate this Arcana from the Heaven Splitting Sect, even if they fought fiercely, the final victor might not necessarily get the Arcana Treasure, after all, there were other Dao Ancestor incarnations rushing over.

If the other Dao Ancestor incarnations were cheapened, and they, the most recent Dao Ancestor incarnations, did not snatch the Supreme Treasure, it would be extremely regrettable.

What's more, they don't want to fight too hard.

If someone is powerful and directly snatches away the treasure, then there is no need to fight anymore.

"Do it!"

Boom Boom Boom !!

A famous Dao Ancestor incarnated and made a move, instantly cutting off the connection between the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar and the earth, and also breaking the fusion aura of the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar and the Heaven Splitting Sect, completely allowing the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar to break away alone.

At this moment, the Dao Ancestor avatars all struck out in unison and snatched the Heaven Splitting God Pillar.

The fight has begun!

I saw that one Dao Ancestor incarnation had just put the ordinary Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar into the internal space, and several other Dao Ancestor incarnations joined forces to tear apart the physical body, cutting off the connection between the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar and the space in the body, and forcibly shaking the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar out.

The battle was very tragic, a famous Dao Ancestor incarnation was injured, and there was almost no intact Dao Ancestor incarnation.

Ye Tian was also not far away, but he didn't get involved at the first time, otherwise it would be easy to cause other Dao Ancestor incarnations to join forces.

After all, for the Dao Ancestor incarnations, this is their battlefield, and his participation in the participation of a true monarch is completely provoking them!

Moreover, the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar was snatched away by a certain Dao Ancestor incarnation, which only proved that the Dao Ancestor incarnation was powerful, but if it was snatched away by him, the True Monarch, it would undoubtedly slap all Dao Ancestors in the face.

The Dao Ancestors would not allow such a thing to happen, and they would all target him.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only find an opportunity to participate.

And this time is not easy to find, Ye Tian does not stop using the great god arithmetic to calculate this opportunity.

Although the level of the great god arithmetic is not high, and it can no longer keep up with Ye Tian's current strength, it is difficult to deduce the battle at the level of Dao Ancestor incarnation, but if Ye Tian forcibly deduces, he can still deduce some things, which is much more reliable than casually deducing or observing with his eyesight.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian calculated this opportunity, and when the time came, he didn't say a word, and did it directly.

Void shift!

Ye Tian's figure appeared on the battlefield, grabbed the Heaven Splitting Pillar with one hand, and at the same time cast the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, enveloping the Heaven Splitting Pillar, pulling the Heaven Splitting Pillar into the body universe at the fastest speed.

Using the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique to collect the Heaven Splitting God Pillar, the speed is much faster than that of other Dao Ancestor incarnations.

The reason why these Dao Ancestor incarnations have fought until now, and they have not included the Heaven Splitting God Pillar in the internal space, is because the speed of collection is too slow, and they have not been successfully collected, so they have been interrupted by other Dao Ancestor incarnations.

And Ye Tian grasped the timing very skillfully, it was the moment when the Dao Ancestor incarnations made a move, so that these Dao Ancestor incarnations needed to be slow down if they wanted to stop Ye Tian.

And in a slightly slower time, Ye Tian successfully incorporated the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar into the inner universe.

"Run!"

Ye Tian had just received the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar, and without saying a word, he fled directly, not daring to stay here.

Even if he is very strong, if he is surrounded by these Dao Ancestor incarnations, he will definitely die!

The true body of the blood river was cast, and all kinds of defense methods were displayed one by one, Ye Tian even used the three-in-one one, and almost all of the divine power was transformed into physical power, so that the physical defense was enhanced to the extreme.

In this way, his life-saving means were further strengthened.

"Look for death!"

A famous Dao Ancestor incarnated into anger.

These Dao Ancestors fought for the Supreme Treasure, but in the end, Ye Tian, the True Monarch, snatched the Supreme Treasure, which was simply a slap in their faces, and it was also beaten in the bright light, trampled on it fiercely!

Rumble!!!

Sword light, sword light, fist light, and the power of various origin supernatural powers blasted towards Ye Tian one after another.

No matter how terrible Ye Tian's defense was, he was still broken through the defense.

In an instant, Ye Tian's body was penetrated many times, and the whole person was almost blown up.

However, after Ye Tian's strength increased, his speed was much faster than before, much faster than that of ordinary Dao Ancestor incarnations, and among the Dao Ancestor incarnations present, there was no one who was particularly good at speed and strength, so Ye Tian left the battlefield at the first time.

And Ye Tian immediately burned nearly half of his essence and spirit, and exploded with extreme speed, increasing the power of the void movement to a terrifying degree, widening the distance between him and the other Dao Ancestor incarnations.

And just when the other Dao Ancestor incarnations were about to use various means to increase their speed, Ye Tian cast the Black Wind Domain Boundary Technique, connected to the small realm, and his body pierced through the void and descended to the small realm.

The Dao Ancestor incarnations didn't stop Ye Tian at the first time, they had already missed the best time, and they couldn't stop Ye Tian at all.

At this moment, Ye Tian had already entered the small realm, and with their strength, they couldn't find the small realm at all, and they couldn't enter the small realm.
